problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
